introSection: Holta Di Polta is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Rasti-Land in Salzhemmendorf, Lower Saxony, Germany. It opened in April 2019.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 3 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders.

fullText:
Holta Di Polta is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Rasti-Land in Salzhemmendorf, Lower Saxony, Germany. It opened in April 2019.



Single train with 3 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 12 riders.
